images.depicts: single roasted orange yam, steam rising
peg-doll boy biting a roasted yam happily
a string mop presented on a fancy gold-rimmed plate
grey rat cracking open a nut, cheek stuffed
white duck holding a whole purple fig in its beak
scruffy grey/tan wire-haired dog licking red jam off a spoon on a plate
images.issue: Dog's coat reads grey/tan wire-haired terrier, not the established solid-brown 'Dog' cast color used elsewhere in the curriculum (e.g. Week 20 jam callback) — cast-consistency drift, not a content mismatch.

images.depicts: white duck with a striped sock draped around its neck/held in beak
giant roasted yam on a woven mat with cat, dog, rat and duck holding forks around it
images.issue: artNote/mjPrompt call for 'the whole cast' including two peg dolls (Segina, Sam) gathered around the yam; the delivered image only shows the four animal cast members, no peg-doll children present.

images.depicts: a Highland cow: long outward-curving horns, shaggy reddish-brown coat, cow-shaped body
images.issue: This is a Highland cow/cattle, not a yak. Yaks have a stockier oxen-like body, shorter down-curved horns, a dewlap, and very long shaggy coat/skirt reaching near the ground with a bushy tail. Species mismatch — needs regeneration.

images.depicts: red yoyo mid-spin on its string
ball of red yarn with crossed wooden knitting needles
a small white toy/model sailboat on a dark teal cloth
images.issue: Reads as a small toy/ceramic model boat rather than a full-size sailing yacht — acceptable given the prompt explicitly said 'small,' but visually toy-like.

images.depicts: cup of white yogurt with a raspberry on top and a spoon
bright golden egg yolk in a white bowl
friendly fluffy white yeti creature sitting
nervous cartoon-faced potato on a plate with a fork poised beside it

line_map.line: [Intro] y… y… y… (a quick smiling glide)

line_map.note: existing yak.png depicts a Highland cow, not a yak — needs regeneration

asset manifest calls for potato.png (teacher potato w/ glasses, REUSED FROM WEEK 1) but the file does not exist in this week's images folder; only potato-taste.png (different scene, nervous potato on a plate) is present

line_map.line: [Final Hook] Y-y-yeti! Y-y-yeti! It's a yeti, yeti, yeti!

wrong_art.issue: Depicts a Highland cow (long outward-curving horns, shaggy reddish coat, cattle body shape), not a yak.
wrong_art.fix: Regenerate as a Tibetan yak (stocky oxen body, short down-curved horns, dewlap, long shaggy coat reaching the ground, bushy tail).

line_map.line: [Hook] Yum! A yam! Yum! A yam! Is it yum? (yes! yes!)
[Verse 2] Yum! A nut! Yum! A nut! Is it yum? (yes! yes!)
[Verse 3] Yum! A fig! Yum! A fig! Is it yum? (yes! yes!)
[Verse 4] A sock?! A sock?! Is it yum? (NO! NOT yum!)
[Outro] A potato?! Is it yum? (POTATO! YUM!) Yum… a yam…
